## ADD — how to work in this repo

This project uses **ADD (AI-Driven Development)**. Before you change code:

1. Run `python3 .add/tooling/add.py status` — it tells you where the project
   is and what to do next (the resume point; read it first every session).
2. Read `.add/PROJECT.md` — the foundation (domain · spec · UI/UX) that every
   task builds on.
3. Work the active task's current phase in `.add/tasks/<slug>/TASK.md`. Keep its
   `phase:` marker in sync via `add.py phase`/`advance`, and record the verify
   gate with `add.py gate`.

The full method (the book) is in `.add/docs/`. This block is generated by
`add.py sync-guidelines`; edit outside the markers, not inside.
<!-- ADD:END -->
